title: trifolium palmeri
intro: Trifolium palmeri, also known as Palmer's clover, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Trifolium palmeri include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues. Trifolium palmeri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in poultices and salves to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
